debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
inst✝⁵ : CommRing K
inst✝⁴ : ValuativeRel K
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : CommRing L
inst✝² : ValuativeRel L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : ValuativeExtension K L
⊢ ⟨(algebraMap K L) ↑0, ⋯⟩ = 0

proof:
by
      -- Prove that the algebra map preserves the additive identity
      ext
      simp [RingHom.map_zero]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [val_one]) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try aesop)
failed_attempts: ith

map_add' := sorry
    map_one' := sorry
    map_mul' := sorry
    map_zero' := sorry

by
      have h₁ : algebraMap K L (0 : K) = (0 : L) := by
        simp [Algebra.map_zero]
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try aesop)
  }

by
    simp [add_zero]

by
      simp [Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try aesop)
  }

by
      simp [RingHom.map_zero]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [algebraMap, Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [algebraMap, Subtype.ext_iff]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf)
          <;>
          (try norm_num)
          <;>
          (try aesop)
        })
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, Algebra.algebraMap_zero]
      <;>
      simp_all [algebraMap_zero]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try aesop
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try ring_nf) <;>
      (try simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff, AddMonoidHom.map_add]) <;>
      (try aesop)
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff, algebraMap_apply]
      <;>
      simp_all [Algebra.algebraMap_zero, Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try linarith)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          cases'_eq (val : WithTop ℕ) (⊥ : WithTop ℕ) <;>
          simp_all [WithTop.bot_lt_coe]
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          cases'_eq (val : WithTop ℕ) (⊥ : WithTop ℕ) <;>
          simp_all [WithTop.bot_lt_coe]
        })
  }

map_add' := sorry
    map_one' := sorry
    map_mul' := sorry
    map_zero' := sorry
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [zero_smul]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [Algebra.map_zero]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [zero_smul]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      simp [toFun]
      <;>
      simp_all [val_zero]
      <;>
      norm_num
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [val_zero]
          <;>
          norm_num
          <;>
          aesop
        })
  }

by
      simp [Algebra.map_zero]
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
  }

by
      ext
      simp [Algebra.algebraMap_zero]
  }

by
      simp [zero_apply]
      <;> rfl
  }
successful_attempts:
by
      -- Prove that the algebra map preserves the additive identity
      ext
      simp [RingHom.map_zero]
      <;>
      (try norm_num) <;>
      (try simp_all [val_one]) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try aesop)
